_description: Stochastic consensus — 3 independent architects propose solutions to the same problem, synthesizer identifies agreement zones (high confidence) and divergence zones (needs human input).
_requires: Set CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 in settings.json env section
_workflow: Parallel: [architect-a, architect-b, architect-c] independent proposals → synthesizer consensus map
_usage: Reference via /consensus command. Use for irreversible decisions: DB schema, API contracts, auth design, core data models.
_pattern: Stochastic Ensemble — same prompt, independent stochastic paths, consensus = confidence signal

roles.name: synthesizer
roles.role: Receives all three independent proposals. Maps them to a consensus report: AGREED (all three aligned — implement with confidence), MAJORITY (2/3 aligned — note the minority view), SPLIT (all three diverged — surface to human for decision). Does not pick a winner. Produces a consensus map with specific decision points, not a narrative summary.

roles.name: architect-a
roles.role: Independently designs a solution to the stated problem. Has NO visibility into what other architects will propose. Produces: approach, file structure, key interfaces, sequence. Be concrete and specific.

roles.name: architect-b
roles.role: Independently designs a solution to the stated problem. Has NO visibility into what other architects will propose. Produces: approach, file structure, key interfaces, sequence. Be concrete and specific.

roles.name: architect-c
roles.role: Independently designs a solution to the stated problem. Has NO visibility into what other architects will propose. Produces: approach, file structure, key interfaces, sequence. Be concrete and specific.

sequence: 1. synthesizer distributes the problem to all three architects simultaneously (parallel)
2. architect-a, architect-b, architect-c produce independent proposals with no cross-visibility
3. synthesizer receives all three proposals and maps each decision point: AGREED / MAJORITY / SPLIT
4. synthesizer outputs consensus map — AGREED items go to implementation, SPLIT items escalate to human
